entry.title: Custom Exchange Rate Types in the Costing Variant or Valuation Variant.
entry.content:
Dear ALL.

In Public Cloud, the exchange rate type 'P' is specified in the Costing Variant of 'PPC1'.

I want to create a new exchange rate type(Custom Exchange Rate Types) and then assign it to another costing variant "PYC1", is it possible?

Thank you,

Su Young

entry.title: Post the additional resource request and set the distribution
entry.content:
How to create requests for Resources of type (0ADL) : Additional Resources and set the distribution to specific month?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Post the additional resource request and set the dist...
entry.content:
Please refer to the help document under the 'Examples' section, specifically focusing on the part about ' Create Resource Demand of Type "Additional Resource". 

Sample:
POST <host>/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_ProjectDemand/A_ProjectDemand

{
    "ProjectDemandCategory": "03",
    "ReferencedObjectUUID": "DDA235EE-C291-1EEF-84BA-AC1A7519C420",
    "ProjectDemandType": "S303",

    "to_Work": {
        "ActivityType": "U006",
        "ProjectElementWorkItem": "P001",
        "ProjDmndBillingControlCategory": "",
        "ProjDmndRequestedDeliveryOrg": "1010",
        "to_ResourceRequest": {
            "results": [
                {
                    "to_ProjDmndRsceReqDistr": {
                        "results": [

                            {
                                "ProjDmndRsceReqDistrYearVal": "2024",
                                "ProjDmndRsceReqDistrPerdVal": "05",
                                "ProjDmndRsceReqDistrQuantity": "30.00"
                            },
                            {
                                "ProjDmndRsceReqDistrYearVal": "2024",
                                "ProjDmndRsceReqDistrPerdVal": "06",
                                "ProjDmndRsceReqDistrQuantity": "20.00"
                            }
                        ]
                    }
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}

entry.title: Re: Reforma tributária, CBS3 IBS3 via MIGO?
entry.content:
Dear @Eduardolarrion Eduardo


As you have already opened an SAP support case 642106/2025, if the solution does not work for you,
I would suggest you continue the conversation, by posting your test results and questions in the case for further help.


Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: SAP API PROXY principal propagation error 403
entry.content:
Usually there are more details in the HTTP response body. So what does it say? (For some strange reason, nobody today looks at the body, when they get a non-200 HTTP status code, but especially in error-cases, the body is more important than the code.)

In case of an authentication problem (like Principal Propagation not working), you would get a 401, not a 403. So probably something else is wrong. Two common reasons for 403:

  • You forgot to add the URL to the Access Control List of the SCC. (The SCC then returns a 403, without forwarding the request to the backend.)
  • The user was able to log in ok, but doesn't have the necessary authorization roles to execute the requested URL. (The backend then returns 403.)

But again, the HTTP body will tell you the reason.

entry.title: Re: Integration of ABAP world in SAP Build
entry.content: @rahul_kishor  Thanks for the blog. I'm trying to connect SAP Build to a BTP ABAP Instance, but I get stuck on a few things. It appears both the Communication System and the ABAP System appearing when choosing an SAP Build "Full Stack Application" are pointing to the same SAML-based Destination. Does this mean SAP Build and the ABAP Instance need to always be in the same subaccount, or can they be in different ones?

entry.title: Can I create checkboxes in document generation?
entry.content:
Hi All, 

 

In document generation, in SuccessFactors Employee Central, I am trying to create a "form" that is input with data from system. The form has a section for check boxes. Is it possible to create keys to populate the checkbox with a value if it fits the description for the section?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Recount Physical Inventory by RF Device to same Resource
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

I have scenario with my customer that when they Do Recount for certain physical inventory Document, they want that the one who's doing the count doing the recount and automatically open task for them in the RF 
I have configured the queues right for physical inventory and recounting physical inventory and assigning user to tolerance group and i didn't set check box (diff user) in the setting 


but the system behavior is very strange when i do recount, the new PI document doesn't assign to the same user automatically and even when i assign same resource to the open warehouse order through warehouse monitor it doesn't open task for him in the RF Device , the only way to procced the new physical inventory document [Recount] in the RF ,  I have to do it manually through Warehouse order in RF option

can you guide me for this issue?

entry.title: Re: Apply header-level freight split to line items based...
entry.content:
Dear MK, For the requirement you mentioned: "The requirement is when we input 2,100 THB at the header level, it should be automatically divided by the total quantity to get the freight per unit, and then multiplied by the quantity at each line item accordingly." I think that you only want the system distribute the freight according to the item quantity. If the understanding is correct, you can consider to use the BADI 

Custom Logic: Condition Base Value | SAP Help Portal

to set the condition base value as the item quantity.

In this way, the system will distribute the freight according the quantity.

Best Regards,

Joey

entry.title: Opening &and Closing Inventory IFP Calculation
entry.content:
Dear All, 

Could anyone please assist with calculating inventory flow in IFP during planning? I'm trying to apply a formula like:

Opening Inventory + Purchases – Consumption + Closing Inventory

to determine the inventory on hand at the end of the current year and the beginning of the next year.

entry.title: Re: SAP API PROXY principal propagation error 403
entry.content:
Greetings Ulrich, when executing the request through the APIM test it returns nothing in the body. Unfortunately i cant get you a screenshot of the APIM test window as i found out today that my integration suite trial ended (despite my btp trial still having 30 more days). However, on the back-end i cant find any requests in the ICM logs, so i assume it stopped at SCC, but i also cant find any logs there about it either.

Edit: Frotunately, one of my windows didnt refresh and was as i left it yesterday as i tried to make a request, this is what it looks like when i send a request

entry.title: Po for discounted price negative value
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we have a requirement ..

It is required to add a negative value, comparable to a discount on PO header level, in a PO.

scenario : 1

added a discount DRV1 on PO header level there seems to be a link to the line items

the same amount (here 250 EUR) is automatically added to each line item.

That is not what we need. We need the discount to be shown as one discount to the total PO value.

scenario :2

Option 2:

I tried to add a line item with a negative value, e. g. -50.000 EUR.

there I received the error message 

 

"net price is negative. please correct." which means that only positive values are allowed.

is that due to some customizing?

 

scenario :3

ignore the discount in the PO, create a credit note request with 50.000 EUR linked to the PO.

 from FI perspective, if that is feasible and technically possible.

Kindly need your suggestions

entry.title: Reading child entity in parent entity's determination doesn't work
entry.content:
I am trying to update the total number of items in child entity (Material) in a field in parent entity (Catalogue), however, the read statment returns empty rows for the child entity. How can I fix this, I want to get the count of all the rows in the child entity and update this number in a field in parent entity. Following is the behavior definition and implementation. Thanks.

managed implementation in class zbp_i_catalogue unique;
strict ( 2 );
with draft;

define behavior for zI_catalogue //alias <alias_name>
persistent table zcatalogue
draft table zcatalogue_dr
lock master total etag LastChangedAt
authorization master ( global )
{

  create ( authorization : global );
  update;
  delete;

  field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) CatalogueId;
  field ( readonly ) CategoryDescription, Active, TotalItems, Version,
  CreatedAt, CreatedBy, LastChangedAt, LastChangedBy;

  association _materials { create; with draft; }

  determination saveTotalItems on save { create; }

  draft action Activate optimized;
  draft action Discard;
  draft action Edit;
  draft action Resume;
  draft determine action Prepare;

  mapping for zcatalogue
    {
      CatalogueId         = catalogue_id;
      Name                = name;
      Description         = description;
      Category            = category;
      CategoryDescription = category_description;
      Active              = active;
      TotalItems          = total_items;
      Version             = version;
      ValidFrom           = valid_from;
      ValidTo             = valid_to;
      LastChangedAt       = last_changed_at;
      LastChangedBy       = last_changed_by;
      CreatedBy           = created_by;
      CreatedAt           = created_at;
    }
}

define behavior for zI_material //alias <alias_name>
persistent table zmaterial
draft table zmaterial_dr
lock dependent by _catalogue
authorization dependent by _catalogue
{
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) MaterialId;
  field ( readonly ) CatalogueId, CatalogueName, CreatedAt, CreatedBy, LastChangedAt, LastChangedBy;
  
  association _catalogue { with draft; }

  mapping for zmaterial
    {
      MaterialId    = material_id;
      CatalogueId   = catalogue_id;
      CatalogueName = catalogue_name;
      Description   = description;
      Price         = price;
      Currency      = currency;
      Uom           = uom;
      LastChangedAt = last_changed_at;
      LastChangedBy = last_changed_by;
      CreatedBy     = created_by;
      CreatedAt     = created_at;
    }
}
CLASS lhc_zI_catalogue DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_abap_behavior_handler.
  PRIVATE SECTION.

    METHODS saveTotalItems FOR DETERMINE ON SAVE
      IMPORTING keys FOR zI_catalogue~saveTotalItems.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lhc_zI_catalogue IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD saveTotalItems.

    READ ENTITIES OF zI_catalogue IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY zI_material
        ALL FIELDS WITH VALUE #(
            FOR key IN keys (
                CatalogueId = key-CatalogueId
            )
        )
        RESULT DATA(lt_materials).

    IF lt_materials IS NOT INITIAL.

      MODIFY ENTITIES OF zI_catalogue IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY zI_catalogue
      UPDATE FIELDS ( TotalItems )
      WITH VALUE #( FOR _key IN keys ( %tky = _key-%tky TotalItems = lines( lt_materials ) ) ).

    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Trigger notification to the User who created Po, after the downpayment is done
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would like to know if it is possible to send a notification to the user who created the PO after the down payment is made by the finance team. This would be helpful for them to eliminate the need to ping the finance team to inquire about the down payment status.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: getting csv file from AL11 into internal table,append...
entry.content:
Have you already tried the different linefeed options of the statement OPEN DATASET like:

  • WITH NATIVE LINEFEED
  • WITH SMART LINEFEED
  • WITH UNIX LINEFEED
  • WITH WINDOWS LINEFEED

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA SM13 DB Deadlock in Update FCMLAH_STATUS_POSTING
entry.content:
Dear @Mingo,

Could you please check if the following SAP note applies to your system?
2610890 - Deadlock when updating the table MLRUNLIST

If the issue persists, you may continue troubleshoot the problem by referring to the following SAP note:
2399990 - How-To: Analyzing ABAP Short Dumps in SAP HANA Environments
You can find details by searching "deadlock" in the above document.

Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Running Transfer Jobs of SAP SLT is getting terminated automatically after certain time
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have setup SAP Landscape Transformation from SAP S/4HANA system (as the source DB) to SAP CAR system (as the target DB). We have assigned the background jobs in the following way:

We can see that the running transfer jobs is currently 1.

However, every morning we are observing that transfer jobs is becoming 0, and we need to deactivate and activate the configuration again to trigger the transfer job so that the delta load of the data can be started which were stuck previously.

Kindly suggest a solution about how to solve this issue or what can be checked from our end to resolve it.

Thanks & Regards,
Soumya

entry.title: SuccessFactors Employee Central - Automatic Job Relationship Record Creation
entry.content:
Introduction :

In this Blog, I am explaining in detail about how we can make the best use of intelligent services and integration center to automate the process of Job Relationship creation during New Hire.

Details of the Configurations:

Often the maintenance of Job Relationship is missed during new hire creation, and this impacts the workflows and also the PMGM process where it is dependent on the relationships maintained. This Gap can be addressed by leveraging the integration center and intelligent services (ISC) (Thanks to ISC's Event Driven Capability).

Relationship Type :

Relationship Type Label is to be mentioned in the Default Value field , you can check for the Relationship defined under Picklist Center -> jobRelType

 

Event Date :

Event Date is to be mapped to Job Information Start Date

User ID :

Map The User ID to the User ID from Job Information

ReluserID :

RelUserID can either be mentioned in the Default Value or mapped through the calculated Filed if you want it to assign based on conditions.I have mapped it based on the company of the Employee.

and we are all set with the configurations in the Integration Center. Repeat the above steps if you want to maintain Mutiple Job Relationships!

Next is to assign the Integration to the Employee Hire Event which can be done from the Intelligent Services Center.

Please verify if your integration is shown in the Flow

In this case, I am maintaining 2 Relationships (Matrix Manager and HR Manager).

To make all this count, Assigning the Trigger rule is the most important and crucial Task.

Go to Manage Business Configuration -> Assign the Trigger Rule under Job Information 

SAP_EVENT_HIRE is a predelivery event for the ISC by SAP and it is advised not to modify the Rule

Hire a New Employee and See the Magic of Integration in Action!

 

 

Check the Source and this record has been inserted through the Integration Center (API)

Conclusion : 

By leveraging Intelligent Services and the Integration Center, we can seamlessly automate the creation of Job Relationships during the new hire process. This not only eliminates manual steps but also ensures critical relationships like Matrix Manager and HR Manager are consistently and accurately maintained from day one.

Key Benefits:

  • ✅ Improved Data Accuracy – Reduces errors due to missed relationships during hiring.

  • ⚙️ Process Automation – Saves time and effort for HR teams by automating repetitive tasks.

  • 🔄 Workflow Optimization – Ensures downstream processes like workflows and PMGM function smoothly.

  • 📈 Better Compliance & Governance – Maintains standardization across the organization.

Feel Free to Drop your Thoughts and Comments!

entry.title: Re: Infotype 0001 Inconsistent data exists in the database for infotype 0021 A - SF to ECC Replicati
entry.content:
Hi, 

Thanks for these reports, we could fix the one case that was causing issue with it. 

I don't have an answer for you unfortunately, but I guess you could schedule over night this RPUPAV00 report on then rang number of your employees. I did a test on my side and with ~15000 relevant number it's a reasonable execution time. 

Best regards

Christopher

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - Forms Service by Adobe and Forms Service by Adobe API free tier
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have the same question. Does the 'Default (Application)' plan incur any cost?

After subscribing to 'Default (Application)' plan, both the URLs below are not working.

https://<sudbomain>-ads.formsprocessing.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/ui/customer/index.html
https://<sudbomain>-ads.formsprocessing.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/adsrestapi/ui.html

Error - 500 - Internal Server Error

Kindly suggest.

BR, Mohan

entry.title: How to Use Custom Email Addresses from a Z-Table for Invoice Output in OPD?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’m working on an output scenario where the recipient email address for invoice output should be determined from a custom Z-table. This table contains (among other things) an email address for each possible invoice recipient.

To make this work, I’ve extended the relevant CDS view (C_BILLINGDOCUMENTOMPARAMDET) using a custom field that reads the email address from the Z-table. In the OPD (Output Parameter Determination), I’m able to select this custom field and assign it to the email recipient parameter.

The issue: although the CDS view field is correctly filled with the email address, the invoice output is still generated without any recipient email address. My suspicion is that the output is being generated before the CDS field is populated, meaning the value is not yet available when the output is triggered.

Is there a supported way to fetch recipient email addresses from a Z-table for invoice output?

Is it possible to delay or control the timing of output generation to ensure the email field is populated beforehand?

Or is there a completely different (preferred) method for managing custom recipient email addresses?

 

(I’m aware of the possible expression "Add email recipients from custom logic" in the Public Cloud version of OPD, but unfortunately this is not available in our Private Cloud environment.)

Any insights or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Table field REGUH-LAUFI (Identification) - how the 6t...
entry.content:
Hello,

As far as I've seen, the 6th character 'B' means that Payment Batch has been created and this ID is for the Payment Batch, not Payment Run. It is used for/in Bank Communication Management, and payment batches can be seen in BNK_MONI transaction (and in BNK_MONIP).

Regards

entry.title: Un-select record after executing bound action
entry.content:
I have an RAP app in Public Cloud.

It has a bound action that updates the status of a record. Bound action works fine but those records that are selected for the action still remains selected. This app has multiple views, so those selected/processed records are now on another view but they are still detected by the app as selected. Coz when I try to select another set of records and update the status, it still recognize the previous records which therefore are still selected . 

How can I unselect processed records from an executed bound action?

entry.title: Re: SAP API PROXY principal propagation error 403
entry.content:
Well, every HTTP server returns a body with error details... The problem is only, that most HTTP clients (in this case APIM?!) "ignore" the body in case of an error and don't display or trace it....

In the SCC, set the Security Audit Log to "All". Then the SCC will write an audit log entry for every request it receives (accepted or denied). Then, if there is nothing in the audit log, you have the prove that it doesn't reach the SCC.

But I have no idea, what other component could then generate a 403?! You would have to open a ticket for BC-CP-CON to get the Connectivity Service logs checked.

entry.title: Label/description issues on SAC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have 2 models from backend calculation view and have created 2 stories based on the models.

I modified the label/description for couple of columns for both the models in "Modeler" section on SAC Development but this doesn't get reflected/overwritten after transport/deployment/import to production.

During transport, I selected the 2 stories and the 2 models. 

I have all the roles so roles isn't an issue here. I can even do a change from the calculation view but would like to know the reason behind not getting reflected on production.

Can you share some steps on what I can check on SAC if indeed the labels/descriptions are imported to production.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Charging of service items to additional service providers in SAP S/4 HANA Transportation Management
entry.content:
This blog post will help readers, customers, and SAP TM users familiarize themselves with the SAP Transportation Management’s functionality to carry out execution of additional services and associated payments in S/4 HANA 2023.

In this blog post I will be shedding light on carrying out additional service payment by eliminating the need to create additional documents thus reducing process complexity. The process may vary on the business needs and situational in nature.

You can read more about SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management -Settlement in the Application Help for SAP S/4HANA

Settlement | SAP Help Portal

Note: I have carried out the demonstration based on my personal tests, observations, insights in S/4HANA 2023 release with relevant screen shot from an internal system for ease of understanding. There’s no relevance or relation to any external source.

Use Case

Use case is for both the customers in Transportation & Logistics Industry (T&L) as well as shippers from Retail, CPG, manufactures etc. operating via Road and have to pay Additional fees for services incurred during or before executing the journey e.g. cleaning, fumigation or insurance etc over and above the contracted charges to an external party. The nature of the charge may be incidental in nature and not applicable for moves.

Assumption: 

The customer is a Manufacturing company and has implemented SAP S/4HANA 2023 and uses embedded SAP Transportation Management.

They have yearly contracts with the multiple road carriers to move certain capacities on a given corridor/ route. Alternatively, they have transportation network across different geographics which involves multiple entry and exists at the border crossing posts involving fees associated towards documentation/processing fees etc. As mentioned earlier this is applicable only if the truck crosses the border here by making it extremely important to track such services and associated charges.   The charges may vary depending on the border crossing location as each border crossing is managed by external parties. Contract in the SAP TM world should be referred as FRA (Freight Agreement).

Challenge:

  • SAP S/4HANA 2022 and lower releases supported such a scenario by creating an additional document termed as a service order which was linked to the associated freight order.
  • A service order as mentioned involves a cumbersome task to process it manually or an enhancement to automate the service order creation and associated settlement.

Solution:

SAP TM now has an out of the box solution to enable charge calculation and settlement for a service incurred in a freight order depending on the location and time of the service. This eliminates the need to create an additional document i.e. the service order and also the stage alternation (Intermediate stop) in the freight order isn’t required to identify the border crossing location.

 (*Depending on the scenarios, Service orders can be leveraged and its significance should be evaluated on a case-by-case basis)

Note: There are multiple ways in which the additional agreement party can be determined be it via std partner determination profile config or via an available BADI, and purely based on the business rule.

Scenario:
A manufacturer is moving goods from its facility in Canada to a customer in US and can be routed via a border crossing across three different points i.e.

  1. Fort Erie
  2. Niagara Falls – Rainbow Bridge
  3. Niagara Falls – Whirlpool Rapids Bridge

Border crossing across three different points - Designed by Aditya Shinde only for representation purpose.Determining the shortest or most applicable route is not in the scope of this blog post. Every border crossing location is operated by an external party and charges vary depending on the location/Service provider. The manufacturer is entitled to pay an associated fee depending on multiple factors but here we will consider service provider and service location as the prime driver to identify payable amount.

Let’s move directly at an instance in time where a road FRO is created with 1 active stages with executing carrier along with Border crossing agent as the Additional agreement party. The truck will cross the border via Fort Erie

We have valid Service types, Freight agreement i.e. 1 for executing carrier and 1 for Border crossing agent.

We start with an assumption that Order management, planning, Charge management and settlement configs are in place as the focus is not on setting up the system but on functionality walk-through.

Pictorial representation of the demonstrated scenario:

Fort Erie border crossing point - Designed by Aditya Shinde only for representation purpose.Basic process flow (Representation purpose only) 

Step 1:  Road FRO is created with executing carrier determined.

 Step 2 : Border crossing agent BP added as Additional agreement party.

As mentioned earlier there are multiple ways to determine a BP for Additional agreement party. For demonstration purpose I have added the BP manually and executing/invoicing carriers may be determined subcontracting process.


Step 3: Once the carriers are determined, you can observe that a special service by the name ‘BC- Border crossing’ is assigned to the freight order.

 Important aspect to note here is that we have added 4 important values that play a pivotal role in triggering and performing charge calculation:

  1. Service type
  2. Check box (Item specific service provider)
  3. Service Location
  4. Duration.

 In the absence on the Check box (Item specific service provider), system will assume the service is performed by the executing carrier and will have to be maintained as part of executing carrier’s freight agreement and will get activated based on the associated service. There by payable to the executing carrier.

Once the above information is captured, you may save the freight order or execute charge calculation manually from the freight order.

Below is the result of the charge calculation.

 

Note: Charge structure and associated charges are for representation purpose and are fictitious in nature.


Step 4:  Freight order stages – Important observation here to make a note is that the stage of the freight order is unaltered here by reducing efforts to trace the border crossing location.

Step 5: Determining charge based on the border crossing location at stage level is possible by leveraging std calculation base.

 Here you can observe that the charge is determined via a rate table.

Rate table created having a calculation base as SRV_LOCATION which identifies the service location.

Alternatively, you can use SRV_DURATION – Service Duration as well to perform charge calculation.

In today’s demonstration, I have considered only service location based calculation.

The screenshot below demonstrates that system was able to initiate FSD creation for all of the applicable payable parties. 
 

The screenshot above demonstrates that no errors were observed during freight settlement document creation process and we can proceed with posting for accruals.
 
Note:
With the introduction of this functionality we can eliminate the introduction of service order which is an additional object and try to keep the process simple and reduce enhancement wherever applicable. Some exceptions may apply based on business scenarios and should be evaluated accordingly.

The demonstration in this blog post doesn’t focus on the configs to setup the system nor does it highlight all of the business rules associated with different industry sectors for the carrier payments.

Hope this article helps all of us understand and simplify the payment process associated with additional services incurred during transportation across various industries in the SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management world. There may be multiple different ways in which a contract may be negotiated between two parties, in this demonstration, I chose to keep it generic and simple.

Thank you for taking time and effort to read this.

Feedback/comments in any form will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Table field REGUH-LAUFI (Identification) - how the 6t...
entry.content: Payment Batch is the result of Merge Payments (FBPM1 transaction, or "Merge Payments" fiori App).

entry.title: Re: Technical Clearing Account in New Asset Accounting
entry.content: good

entry.title: Re: DFKKZP-KLAEB updated with value ************ and DFKKZP-OPBEL updated with value *
entry.content:
Hi Ankit, 

Not sure about the process you are following, but bottomline is once the payment is posted to the respective Contract account, the payment lot status is Postings made.

However when you reverse it back from account to Clarification worklist, it will change to postings made, post processing is required.

Can you clarify what do you mean by opening the payment lot.

Thanks

Amlan

entry.title: Re: 'Company code 0001 is deactivated; hence you cannot'
entry.content: Read Note; 2959566 - Company Code Status check correction (or KBA: 3487088 - Error FAA_CMP094 happens when trying to re-activate a company code )

entry.title: Re: How To Maintain Custom Form (PDF version) By Default...
entry.content:
Hi @ankurch,

Thanks for coming on this , Could you please help me to know  how to make variant default ?  I didn't get that option to make it default

 

Regards,

Shree

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Automatic account determination
entry.content:
Hello,

the automatic account determination in the public cloud is quite nice, but I need the accounts according to transaction, area, chart of accounts, valuation classes in a matrix for my finance team. Is there such a thing?

In the past I could at least drag the table T030 and then convert it into a matrix with all the other tables.

Can SAP provide an answer here?

Why, imagine you come from another software and have to adapt your processes to SAP. As an accountant, you need to know which accounts are automatically posted to by which account determination. In order not to lose the overview and to first compare the chart of accounts with the previous accounts that were used, you need an overview of all accounts that are assigned per account determination.

entry.title: Re: Using LPD_CUST to create launch page for FPM obsolete?
entry.content:
Hi folks, LPD_CUST is DEPRECATED since SAP S/4HANA 2020 and not yet obsolete. 

Deprecated means it still exists.  You should NOT create new entries using this technique. Refer to SAP Note 3013131 - Deprecation of LPD_CUST target mapping type for Fiori

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Stock Calculation in SAP Datasphere: Handling Non-Cumulative Stock Movements | S/4 IM
entry.content:
very useful thanks - Liking the reference to the views that S4 has provided

we are trying to move away from a SAP BW model to a Datasphere model (actually they want a passthrough to a datalake but im not sure this is feasable)

The issue we have is we have vast amounts of stock data and they want granular detail.

Qs

1) would the above models contain the movement types as we use these on a large scale within reports. It just looks like aggregated movements and a detail stock balance. Basically location, day, material and a bit more. We need mkpf/mseg data 

2) we currently have the marker principle in BW where we can move the marker - so we don't have to go too far back to the stock snapshot when adding movements (to reach a current stock figure). How do we cope with marker updates in datasphere? 

 

thanks very much

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...
entry.content: Many thanks Isha. I also read the following from SAP: As we look towards the future, we're announcing the discontinuation of SAP SuccessFactors Professional Certification in its current setup at the end of this year. Best wishes Isha! Regards, Amir

entry.title: How to display taxes for a specific country/region
entry.content:
It is not clear how to display taxes for a specific country or region.

You want to find more details on the relevant tax codes, tax types and if applicable tax jurisdictions for a country/region.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to display taxes for a specific country/region
entry.content: Please see KBA 3629785 How to display taxes for a specific country/region

entry.title: Request to Duplicate Business Unit in SAP CDP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

Would it be possible to duplicate an existing Business Unit in CDP to a new one?
Specifically, we would like to copy one Business Unit from the production environment into a new Business Unit in the development environment.

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request to Duplicate Business Unit in SAP CDP
entry.content:
Duplication of Business units in sense to copy structured data at the moment is not supported in CDP.

In order to create same Business unit from existing Business unit there is option of import and export packages.

For example, your team can export structured data from Business unit PROD in JSON file and then import this file on Business unit DEV.

More details are available in documentation:

Import and export packages

KBA 3292363

entry.title: Re: Sales Promotions & Sales Deals Configurations and Applying Multiple Deals to an Order
entry.content: @r_daneel  Yes. It is available in S/4. All the screenshots and customizations given above are from S/4 Hana.

entry.title: How to put a name/personnel number who runs the report in the Canvas Report?
entry.content:
HI,

I would like to know, if can we put a userID or Name in the Advanced Reporting to indicates either this report is running by whom or exported by whom?

Regards,
Reza

entry.title: Re: Defining Selection Variants for Shipments
entry.content: Very detailed. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Using HANA SQL Tabular Function in SQL Join
entry.content:
Dear @che_eky,
 
I did tests in my local system, HANA supports table function in JOIN.
Here are the steps and the SQLs I used during my test for your reference.
 
1. create a column store table: PRODUCTSALES
---------------------------------
CREATE ROW TABLE "I311040"."PRODUCTSALES" ( "PRODNAME" VARCHAR(50) CS_STRING,
"TYPE" VARCHAR(20) CS_STRING,
"SALES" INT CS_INT ) 
---------------------------------  
 
2. insert a few entries.
---------------------------------
PRODNAME;TYPE;SALES
Tee Shirt;Plain;21
Tee Shirt;Lettered;22
Tee Shirt;Team logo;30
Hoodie;Plain;60
Hoodie;Lettered;65
Hoodie;Team logo;80
Ballcap;Plain;8
Ballcap;Lettered;40
Ballcap;Team logo;27
---------------------------------
 
3. create table function.
---------------------------------
CREATE FUNCTION "I311040"."GET_ITEMS_BY_NAME" (
    IN name NVARCHAR(60)
)
RETURNS TABLE (
    PRODNAME NVARCHAR(60),
    SALES NVARCHAR(60)
)
LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
AS
BEGIN
    RETURN SELECT PRODNAME, SALES
    FROM PRODUCTSALES
    WHERE PRODNAME = :name;
END;
---------------------------------
 
4. JOIN the table function in SELECT statement.
---------------------------------
SELECT
    P.PRODNAME,
    I.SALES
FROM
    PRODUCTSALES P
JOIN
    "I311040"."GET_ITEMS_BY_NAME"('Hoodie') I
ON
    P.PRODNAME = I.PRODNAME;
---------------------------------
 
Result: see attachment "Charles Test result.png".
 
Hope it helps.
 
Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: Equipment Loan in SAP S4 Service
entry.content:
Hi Dequan,

Thanks for your reply. I am looking to setup loaner process using consignment order. Here are the details-

The system must allow the creation of consignment orders to track loaner instruments sent to customers.
Consignment orders should be linked to in-house repair processes using a reference field (e.g., PO number with "In-house repair + service order number").

entry.title: Re: Table field REGUH-LAUFI (Identification) - how the 6t...
entry.content:
Read KBAs:

  • 1944818 - F110: Payment Identification length.
  • 3273670 - Automatic Payment Program - Transaction F110 overview / how-to scenarios

entry.title: Re: SAP ChaRM - Configure the action to read the type of...
entry.content:
@miksoneee wrote:

Hi,

Could someone please tell me how I can configure the step/action, if transport = customizing, will automatically jump from step 3 (To Be Tested) to step 6 (Imported to QA) skipping the additional approvals required to import the transport to QA. (Step 4 - QA Approval Required, Step 5 - QA Movement Approved). I would like this step to check the type of transport and then decide if additional approvals will be required. If transport = workbench additional approvals will be required.

BR,
Szymon

To make Customizing transports (TRs) skip QA approval steps in SAP ChaRM, you need to configure your workflow to conditionally jump from "To Be Tested" (Step 3) directly to "Imported to QA" (Step 6). This is achieved by defining conditions, likely using BRFplus, that check the transport type: if it's a Customizing transport, the system bypasses the "QA Approval Required" (Step 4) and "QA Movement Approved" (Step 5) steps, while Workbench transports will still follow the full approval process. This involves setting up automated actions in ChaRM's status profile, linked to these BRFplus conditions, to trigger the direct import for Customizing TRs.

entry.title: Re: How to link Production Version of FG with Production version of Component
entry.content: This is not a solution to the mentioned issue

entry.title: Blog It Forward - Masashi Otsuka(sumikko)
entry.content:
Please scroll down for the English version.
This post has a lot of pictures so please take a look.

こんにちは、SAP Communityの皆さん！
河原哲也さん @tetsuyakawahara  からご紹介いただき、今回「Blog It Forward」に参加させていただくことになりました。
※Blog It Forwardのことは以前から知っていましたが、まさか自分に回ってくるとは思っていませんでした

この場を借りて、私のSAPとの関わりやコミュニティ活動についてご紹介させていただきます。

 

自己紹介

名前：大塚將司（Masashi Otsuka）
ニックネーム：すみっこ
役割：S/4HANA拡張領域のコンサルタント／開発者
SAP歴：ABAP開発から始まり、現在はSAP BTPやAWSを活用したソリューション開発に従事しています。

2024年には、SAPジャパンより「SAP BTP Champion」として表彰されました。
この賞は、SAP BTPを活用した革新的な取り組みや、コミュニティへの貢献が評価されたものです。

 


人生を変えた2つのきっかけ

私の人生が大きく変わったきっかけは、2つあります。

(1)ブログ「SAPのすみっこ」をはじめ、コミュニティ「chillSAP」を立ち上げたこと


技術的な知見やイベントの記録を発信する中で、思いがけず多くの方に読んでいただけるようになり、社内外から声をかけてもらう機会が増えました。書くことで自分の考えが整理され、発信することで新たな出会いが生まれ、「情報を発信すると情報が集まってくる」「発信は自分を変える力がある」と実感しました。

そして同じようにSNSで発信している人たちと「もっと自由に、もっと楽しくSAPを語れる場を作りたい」という思いから始めたchillSAP。
そこには、年齢も職種も企業も超えて、SAPに関わるあらゆる人が集まりました。
この活動を通じて、本当に多くの人とつながることができ、人生の景色が変わったと感じています。

「chillSAP」は、SAPに関わるすべての人が「ゆるく、楽しく、つながる」ことを目的とした日本発のコミュニティです。
2019年に設立し、現在までに多数のイベントを開催してきました。

イベント：SAPなんでもライトニングトーク祭
SAPに関する話題なら何でもOKの5分間のLT大会。自由な発表スタイルが特徴です。

 

SAP Inside Track Tokyoの開催
2019年からsitTokyoの運営にも携わっています。他国の詳細はあまり把握しきれていないですが、Tokyoはセッション数は世界でもトップクラスなのでは？と思っています。
SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2019 finished a great success #Recap #sitTokyo 
SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2023 
SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2024 イベントサイト 
SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2025 Event Information 

過去動画もYoutubeで公開していますので、ぜひご覧ください。

ちなみに、私もたまに登壇しています。2025年は「ABAP developer capabilities with Joule」をテーマにお話しさせていだきました。よろしければご覧ください。

 

(2)SAP TechEdに参加して刺激的な学びと出会いがあったこと

SAP TechEdは、私にとって技術と人とのつながりを再確認する場です。これまでに複数回参加し、毎回多くの刺激を受けてきました。

2018年
TechEd Las Vegasにブロガーとして初参加
ブログを始めてわずか8か月で、SAPジャパンから招待されて参加。
「まさか自分が」と驚きつつも、現地での体験がその後のキャリアと人生を大きく変えるきっかけに。

2019年
TechEd Las Vegasで「勝手にすみっこNight」開催
自主的に日本人参加者を集めて交流会を開催。企業や立場を超えてつながる場を自ら作り出した経験は、コミュニティ活動の原点のひとつです

2023年
TechEd Bangaloreに現地参加
コロナ後初のオンサイト開催。SAP BuildやAI関連セッションの実践的なデモや現地参加者の熱量に感動。
世界中の開発者と直接交流できたことが、技術的にも人間的にも大きな刺激に。



日本で開催されたSAP TechEd Japanのクロージングセッションでパネリストとして登壇させていただきました

 

2024年
TechEd on Tour @メルボルン（SAUG-x 2024）
空いていて快適な環境で、じっくりとセッションに集中することができました。
SAPジャパンによる日本人向けサポートも充実しており、安心して参加できた。

 

 

 

 

TechEdを通じたモチベーションの再充電
「これがあるから1年頑張れる」と思うほど、TechEdは私にとって心のチャージの場。
SNSやYouTubeで見ていたSAP Communityの有名な皆さんたちのセッションを生で体験できたことは、今でも忘れられません。
私と写真を撮った記憶がある方はいますか？🙋

 

 

 

BIF質問への回答

自分が20歳に戻ったら何を勉強したい？
英語とIT基礎です。これらをしっかりと学ぶべきだったと思っています(いま勉強中です)

両親から学んだベストレッスン
機嫌のいい両親から学んだことは、「自分の機嫌は自分でとる」ということです。

 

次のBlog It Forward参加者

私からは、日本で一緒にコミュニティを運営しているみのさん( @Mino )  にバトンを渡したいと思います。みのさんの知的好奇心の持ち方と信念がブレないところに私は常に刺激をもらっています。
みのさんの BIF ブログを、ぜひお楽しみに！

 

最後に

SAPのすみっこブログから発信を始めて、今では多くの方とつながることができました。これからもコミュニティを盛り上げていきたいと思います。Blog It Forwardにも参加できて光栄です。
ここまで読んでいただき、ありがとうございました！

以下は、私が2018年に初めて社外で登壇した際の写真です




--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello, SAP Community!

Thanks to the introduction from Mr. Tetsuya Kawahara @tetsuyakawahara  , I’m excited to be participating in the Blog It Forward  initiative.

I’ve known about Blog It Forward for a while, but I never imagined it would come around to me!

I’d like to take this opportunity to share a bit about my involvement with SAP and my activities within the community.

 

About me

Name: Masashi Otsuka
Nickname: Sumikko
Role: Consultant/Developer in the S/4HANA Extension Area
SAP Experience: I started with ABAP development and am currently engaged in solution development utilizing SAP BTP and AWS.

In 2024, I was honored by SAP Japan as an SAP BTP Champion.
This award recognizes innovative initiatives leveraging SAP BTP and contributions to the community.

 


Two Turning Points That Changed My Life

There are two major turning points that significantly changed the course of my life.

(1) Starting the blog “SAP Sumikko” and launching the community “chillSAP”

 

While sharing technical insights and event recaps through my blog, I was pleasantly surprised to find that many people started reading it. This led to more opportunities to connect with others, both inside and outside my company. Writing helped me organize my thoughts, and sharing them brought new encounters. I came to truly realize that “sharing information attracts more information” and “sharing has the power to transform you.”

Inspired by others who were also actively sharing on social media, I launched chillSAP with the desire to create a space where people could talk about SAP more freely and enjoyably.

chillSAP brought together people from all backgrounds—regardless of age, profession, or company—united by their connection to SAP. Through this activity, I’ve been able to connect with so many people, and I feel that the entire landscape of my life has changed.

chillSAP is a Japan-born community with the goal of helping everyone involved with SAP connect in a relaxed and enjoyable way.
Founded in 2019, we’ve hosted numerous events to date.

Event Highlight: SAP Anything Lightning Talk Festival
A 5-minute lightning talk event where any SAP-related topic is welcome.
The presentations are characterized by their free and flexible style, allowing participants to share ideas in a relaxed and creative way.

 

Event Highlight: SAP Inside Track Tokyo

Since 2019, I’ve been involved in organizing SAP Inside Track Tokyo (sitTokyo).
Although I’m not fully familiar with the details of other countries’ events, I believe Tokyo ranks among the top globally in terms of the number of sessions.
SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2019 finished a great success #Recap #sitTokyo 
SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2023 
SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2024 イベントサイト 
SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2025 Event Information 

We’ve also published recordings of past sessions on YouTube, so please feel free to check them out!
Youtube

By the way, I also occasionally speak at events.
In 2025, I gave a talk on the theme “ABAP Developer Capabilities with Joule.”
Please feel free to check it out if you're interested!
YouTube

 

(2) Attending SAP TechEd and Experiencing Inspiring Learning and Encounters

SAP TechEd has always been a place for me to reconnect with both technology and people.
I’ve attended multiple times, and each time has brought me fresh inspiration and motivation.

2018
I attended TechEd Las Vegas for the first time as a blogger.
Just eight months after starting my blog, I was invited by SAP Japan to join the event.
I was honestly surprised—“I can’t believe it’s me!”—but the experience on-site became a major turning point in both my career and my life.

2019
At TechEd Las Vegas, I hosted an informal meetup called “Sumikko Night.”
I took the initiative to gather Japanese participants and create a space for connection and conversation.
This experience of building a community space that transcended companies and roles became one of the foundations of my community activities.

2023
I attended TechEd Bangalore in person—the first on-site TechEd after the COVID-19 pandemic.
I was deeply impressed by the practical demos on SAP Build and AI-related sessions, as well as the energy and enthusiasm of the local participants.
Being able to directly interact with developers from around the world was incredibly stimulating, both technically and personally.



I also had the honor of speaking as a panelist during the closing session of SAP TechEd Japan, held in Tokyo.

2024
I participated in TechEd on Tour @ Melbourne (SAUG-x 2024).
The venue was spacious and comfortable, allowing me to fully concentrate on the sessions.
SAP Japan provided excellent support for Japanese attendees, which made the experience smooth and reassuring.

 

 

 

 

Recharging My Motivation Through TechEd

TechEd is a place that recharges my spirit—so much so that I feel, “This is what keeps me going for the year.”
Being able to attend sessions by well-known SAP Community members, whom I had only seen on social media or YouTube, was an unforgettable experience.

It was incredibly inspiring to meet these people in person and feel the energy of the global SAP community.
TechEd reminds me of the joy of learning and the power of connection—it’s a source of motivation that fuels me throughout the year.

Do any of you remember taking a photo with me? 🙋

 

 

 

Answers to Blog It Forward Questions

 

If you could go back to age 20, what would you study?
I would study English and IT fundamentals.
I believe I should have learned these properly back then—I'm currently studying them now!

Best lesson learned from your parents?
From my cheerful parents, I learned this valuable lesson:
“Take care of your own mood.”

 

Next Blog It Forward Participant

I’d like to pass the baton to Mino-san ( @Mino ), who co-manages the community with me here in Japan.
I’m always inspired by his intellectual curiosity and unwavering sense of purpose.
Please look forward to his Blog It Forward post!

 

In Closing

Starting with my blog SAP Sumikko, I’ve been fortunate to connect with many wonderful people.
I hope to continue contributing to and energizing the SAP community.
It’s truly an honor to be part of the Blog It Forward initiative.

Thank you so much for reading all the way through!

Below is a photo from my very first external speaking engagement in 2018.

entry.title: Re: Change document for user is not updating
entry.content: Please avoid posting your new issue in an old discussion which has been created 10 years back.  I don't think, members will respond here.  Create a new discussion, clearly detailing the issue with related screen shots.

entry.title: Clarification on UAE WPS Payment Processing Based on Sponsor ID
entry.content:
Dear Experts

We would appreciate your expertise, help, and support regarding the WPS processing configuration as per UAE regulations and company Group’s internal payroll model. Kindly take note of the following key requirements:

  • In the case of WPS payments, Company Group processes salary disbursements through sponsor-specific bank accounts, rather than the legal entity’s house bank.
  • Each sponsor is linked to a specific bank account, and a single legal entity may have multiple associated sponsors.
  • Therefore, WPS files must be generated based on the Sponsor ID, and not solely by company code.
  • If the Sponsor ID is the same as the Legal Entity ID, then the default house bank for the company code should be used.
  • For example, if a specific business unit has 100 employees across 5 different sponsors, the system should generate 5 separate WPS files, one for each sponsor along with sponsor bank details 
  • Sponsor bank account details are already maintained in the system to support this logic.

Summary of Required Logic:

  • Use Sponsor ID as the basis for WPS file generation.
  • Usi the Company Code’s house bank only when Sponsor ID = Legal Entity ID.

Thanks

Sameer

entry.title: Redesigned Applicant Workbench - "View Profile" Button Now Available!
entry.content:
We're Excited to Bring Back a Favorite Feature in the Redesigned Applicant Workbench!
Thanks to your valuable feedback, we’re pleased to announce a new update to the Redesigned Applicant Workbench—the return of a highly requested feature from the legacy workbench.

The "View Profile" deep link is back!
You can now easily access a candidate’s profile directly from the application detail page, making your navigation smoother and your recruiting workflow more efficient.

This enhancement was driven by customer input through the Influence Portal, where more than 80 customers voted to bring this feature back. We heard you—and we delivered.

Stay tuned for more updates, and thank you for helping us improve your recruiting experience!

Helpful Resources

  • Supercharge Your Hiring with the New Applicant Workbench

  • SAP Help Guide: The Redesigned Applicant Management Tool

  • KBA 3369122: Redesigned Applicant Management Workbench - Recruiting Management

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.title: Re: TR import outside scheduled job in continual cycle
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: New SAP Build Process Automation content for side-by-side extensions with flexible workflows
entry.content: Is there a note that introduces the new parameter outcome in the action com.sap.gateway.default.api_workflow_notification.v0001.ProcessCompleted? I cannot find this in S/4HANA 2023 FP02.

entry.title: Re: BAPI Commit in RAP
entry.content: May be you need to rephrase your post explaining what the issue is with related screen shot and transactions used.

entry.title: Re: Super Dynamic Scaling of SAP ITS Mobile Application Screens using HTML Viewport Meta Tag
entry.content:
dear,

 

did you use a specific HTML template style?

i use the following one and it doesn't work.

I someone have a suggestion.

already thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 BY-PRODUCT
entry.content: Hello, first of all, thank you @Felipe_Lima for your feedback. I noticed that you adjusted inventory through inventory revaluations. Is there another average for calculating costs without going through the revaluation?

entry.title: Unable to read GridView-List
entry.content:
Hello,

some of our colleagues (but just a few) are reporting a problem in viewing a GridView-List in SAP.
However the list appears like in attached screenshot.
This behaviour is not everytime and we haven't been able to reproduce the problem.
Do you have any ideas what causes this problem?

 

Regards,
Steffen

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 BY-PRODUCT
entry.content:
Hi @mari_outtaleb96 ,

Actually, this is not a manual adjustment run by the user, it's just SAP's standard behaviour upon closing the Production Order, where the By-Product cost is deducted from the finished products'.

SAP's guidance provided on the link I shared explains it all.

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: ABAP Call Monitor (SCMON) – Analyze usage of your code
entry.content:
Hi @Vinay_Nalluri ,

to access data from the SUSG tables you can use the package SUSG_API, factory class CL_SUSG_API_FACTORY,  access to the collected data with CDS Views SUSG_V_DATA , SUSG_V_ODATA, or SUSG_V_RDATA.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: DFKKZP-KLAEB updated with value ************ and DFKKZP-OPBEL updated with value *
entry.content:
Hi Amla, 

Correct, But what I am referring to when we reverse the payment directly and do not send it back to clarification. It should not update the status of Payment Lot from postings made to post processing is required. This should only get updated when the payment is sent back to clarification. 

Thanks 

Ankit Mishra

entry.title: What's New in SAP BTP – Q2 2025
entry.content:
Q2 was another big quarter for SAP Business Technology Platform. From application development to integration and analytics, we are excited to share how SAP BTP continues to simplify, streamline, and speed things up! Let's dive into some of the top innovations!

App Dev & Automation Highlights 

Simplified SAPUI5 extensions with the SAP Build Extensibility Wizard 

If your business relies on Cloud ERP as its IT backbone, you know it may need extensions to meet unique requirements. When built-in extensibility isn’t enough, SAP Build on SAP BTP offers powerful options for custom coding and Fiori UI extensions.  

Now, with the SAP Build Extensibility Wizard, you can create UI extensions directly from your Cloud ERP application. By launching the Extensibility Wizard directly from your SAP Fiori application, you are given different options for the type of extension you want to create.

The User Interface Extension lets you either adapt the existing Fiori app or create a new custom application. By setting up your destinations and details in the Wizard, you can either remove sections, add new fields, and create a completely new variant of the application with SAP Build Code and Business Application Studio. Developers and key users can already use it to create custom processes and now, custom user interfaces. 

Watch the video demo (starting at 0:08)  for more insights!   

Learn more:  Simplify SAPUI5 Code Extensions with the SAP Build Extensibility Wizard

Application to Enable Business Users to Manage Decisions

To empower business users to view or maintain decisions within SAP Build Process Automation, we launched a dedicated, purpose-built application that can be accessed directly from SAP Build Work Zone – without the need of IT. 

Business users can access a dedicated application in SAP Build Work Zone to manage decisions within a single project. Users can open the decision table, modify values directly, or import data from Excel and then save their changes, seeing only what matters and making the experience clean and focused. The release of a changed version is only one click away. Any errors are shown in the design console, letting users view the different versions of the project. 

See for yourself in the demo (starting at 2:05)  for more insights!

Learn more 

  • Configure the Stuido Home Application 
  • Using the Studio Home Application

Partner Solutions as an Installable Product on SAP BTP ABAP Environment 

Good news for SAP partners developing apps with SAP BTP ABAP Environment: you can now offer your solution not only as a multitenant Software as a Service solution, but also as an installable product! 

Customers can now install the solution directly in their system as a product. As a part of SAP BTP ABAP Environment, the Landscape Portal supports both delivery options: multitenant SaaS and installable product. 

You can do this in three easy steps:

  1. Build your product with the Register Product app. 
  2. Choose your delivery model: 
    • For multitenant SaaS, configure it in the Maintain Solution app  
    • For installable product, use the Publish Product app. 
  3. Publish your solution to the SAP Store with a PartnerEdge Build contract and an SAP Store enhancement. 

Now customers using SAP BTP ABAP Environment can find your product in the SAP Store and install it into their own system using the Deploy Product option. 

For detailed guidance, watch the demo (starting at 3:42). 

Learn more: Building partner products on SAP BTP ABAP Environment

Integration Highlight

Describe Externalized Parameters of an Integration Flow 

In SAP Integration Suite externalization enables integration developers to define parameters as variables for certain configurations of adapters or flow steps of an integration flow. The values of these parameters can be changed without editing the integration flow, for example, when moving integrations from development or test environment to production. To simplify the understanding of this difficult and technical process, content developers can now provide descriptions directly in the integration flow editor. These can be the potential values, examples or additional details explaining the impact of specific values which will then be visible for guiding through each of the fields in the Configure view. This brings huge potential to improve the maintainability and reusability of your integration scenarios.  

Take a look at the demo (starting at 5:21) and see for yourself! 

Learn more: Externalized Parameters View

Data & Analytics Highlight

Analytical insights in Joule 

Joule, SAP's copilot, now enables you to get quick analytical answers without having to build reports. This provides you with valuable insights, saving time and giving you the information you need. 

Joule scans available data sources and suggests a few options, making comparisons to previous months easier. Joule updates the view right away, making it easy to see how things are trending. For example, you can ask for the top ten sales agents, check the monthly commission trend from January to March, giving you contextual and relevant answers 

See this in action in the demo (starting 7:15).

Learn more: Introducing Analytical Insights in Joule: Empowering Smarter Decisions, Instantly

Cross Platform Highlight

Provision App-Specific Groups in Identity Directory 

SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant enables immediate provisioning of authorizations to target systems in SAP Analytics Cloud target system. You can  centrally manage user-group assignments linked to application-specific policies, triggering provisioning jobs that synchronize access rights efficiently and securely. This ensures users gain prompt access to their designated roles in the target system.

Watch the demo (starting at 8:37) for a closer look. 

Learn more: SAP Cloud Identity Services

Share your thoughts 

These videos are for YOU. We would love to hear your impressions. How do you like the video? How can we improve the upcoming videos? Please share your feedback by liking this post or leaving a comment below.

Thank you for your support and happy viewing, sharing, and enjoying!

You Might Also Be Interested In

  • SAP BTP Garage: monthly LIVE webinar with hands-on use case walkthroughs and demos.
  • SAP BTP Talk Podcast: monthly podcast covering all things SAP BTP.

entry.title: Re: sap BTP BUILD Apps no authorization for ABAP System
entry.content: @Yogananda Hi, I'm facing the same issue. Is some further configuration needed on the BTP ABAP End? I.e. specific Communication System or Communication Arrangements? I cannot find clear information on this

entry.title: Intercompany consignment sales and returns process
entry.content:
Hi,

We"re currently in the process of implementing SAP S/4 Private Cloud (currently in design phase). We"re planning to use the advanced intercompany sales process and have set up a proof of concept in our S/4 EML client - this works well. The query is how to operate the consignment process for intercompany - so this includes interco consignment fill-up / issue / pick up / returns. I have seen an SAP blog stating that this functionality is planned but not yet delivered. Please confirm if this functionality exists in S/4 private cloud - if not and it"s on the delivery roadmap when this is expected to be available.

Thanks

Simon

entry.title: Re: Connectivity between SAP Business Application Studio and XS Advanced
entry.content:
Hi Lukas,

I am not a security expert, so take my answer with a grain of salt.

As per my understanding, it is already taken care for you. That's why you don't select principal propagation in your SAP cloud connector.

entry.title: Re: How to activate CLT in several created projects is po...
entry.content: Thank you for your reply, Does it cost any separate license or subscription or any other special criteria

entry.title: Re: How to activate CLT in several created projects is po...
entry.content: The usage of the feature is not conditioned by an additional license but a review process is taking place to check if the scenario desired would be covered by this functionality. There are multiple restrictions added with this , please see SAP Note https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3107866 for a list of supported countries/regions and available scope.

entry.title: Re: Label/description issues on SAC
entry.content:
Dear @vivek_vk_83,

you need to include Data, in the Selected objects view, during export to also export master data.
During import, you can then select what to import with or without data

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Opening &and Closing Inventory IFP Calculation
entry.content:
Hi,

Are looking for the standard data action name specifically calculating inventory in standard content or useful information to calculate inventory technically with the logic you described? Carryforward function can help if you look for data action set up guidance. Please check this:

 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/afe93e3cf1414a7b8419baad11cc066e.html

In a model with measures, you may want to use measures in your carry forward function. This lets you set up different exception aggregation types over time for the carry forward measures, for example FIRST for the opening measure and LAST for the closing measure. For example: Sample Code DATA() = CARRYFORWARD([d/Measures], "Opening", "Closing", "Opening" + "Increase" - "Decrease")

entry.title: Re: How to activate CLT in several created projects is po...
entry.content: Thank you Lucian

entry.title: Re: Create/add S-user ID in SAP Cloud ALM Tenant
entry.content: One of my customers used IAS for customer internal users and "Default Identity Provider" (S-Users) for external users to save effort maintaining new externals in Identitiy Provider. He still has to create a user with email in Cloud ALM with authorization roles for external users. If SSO is not used, the navigation to either custom or default Provider can be selected via link. I advised the customer in the beginning that this setup is not recommended. Can you spend some words why you strongly discourage connecting "Default Identity Provider"? What could happen or where do you see major problems?

entry.title: Re: DFKKZP-KLAEB updated with value ************ and DFKKZP-OPBEL updated with value *
entry.content:
Ankit, 

There are two flows here-

If the payment has been posted to Account via the payment clarification, it will always go back to payment clarification once you reverse it from the account. and then you want have to reverse it out from the the clarification to reverse the payment.

If the payment is posted directly to the account, then once you reverse it, you get a pop up whether you want to reverse it directly or send it back to Clarification, if you choose reverse directly the payment is reversed and there is no impact on status of payment lot. However if you choose the other option it will  send the payment back to CWL.

So I hope you are going by option 1 here and thats how you are getting it.

Hope it clears the data flow.

Thanks

Amlan

entry.title: Re: Set Master Warranty and warranty start date automatic...
entry.content: Hello, no. I suspect only customization with something like BPA would cover that requirement.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Call Monitor (SCMON) – Analyze usage of your code
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja 

Thanks for your prompt response. 

So, apart from building a custom report for generating the analysis, it is not possible to move the aggregate data from our ECC production to SOLMAN at this point. Is my understanding correct? Or is this something SAP can assist us on the back of a ticket?

entry.title: Re: Opening &and Closing Inventory IFP Calculation
entry.content: @ gunesbt Is it possible to perform this in the standard content of IFP product costing? using same content and if yes how can we calculate

entry.title: S4 Public cloud BOP is not working as expected
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created BOP segment and variant by filtering plant and do not consider particular delivery block and sorting by document number in ascending. once i ran the job it is not confirming the recent document but confirming the latest document.

Kindly advise to solve this.

Regards,
Rajesh

entry.title: Re: DFKKZP-KLAEB updated with value ************ and DFKKZP-OPBEL updated with value *
entry.content:
Hi Amla, 

What you referred is correct.
But the scenario is when the payment is posted for first time it cleared with the invoice and when we reverse the payment with option directly reverse the payment some partial clearing took place and the payment went into clarification and the payment document is updated as '*'.

Now when we post the payment back on account and tries to reverse it. It is not showing the pop up to select whether we need to reverse the payment back to clarification or reverse it directly. Also, we don't see any partial clearing for the payment document and clarification postings amount is also, equal. 

And it is directly going back to clarification.

Now, how can we reverse the payment directly from on account without sending it back to clarification. 

Thanks 

Ankit Mishra

entry.title: Re: Refresh table after execute bound action
entry.content:
Hello @JastinC1 

Thank you for your message.

The bound actions do update the data, but the UI does not automatically refresh filtered table views in S4HANA Public cloud. This is a known limitation in Fiori Elements apps.

Although side effects and $self return values are correctly configured, the current table won’t remove the updated record unless manually refreshed or re-bound. Unfortunately, custom UI refresh logic isn’t supported in standard apps on the public cloud.

We recommend using proper filters on the view and asking users to refresh or switch tabs to see the change. If needed, we can explore building a custom UI with Developer Extensibility for better control.

Check this link! https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/abap-profiling?version=s4hana_cloud

Best regards,
Chuma

entry.title: S4/Hana Custom Code check - Mass-execution of Quick-Fixes
entry.content:
Hello all together,

we are currently dealing with Custom Code Check and I want to execute Mass-wise-Quick-Fixes for some problems.

The execution of quick-Fixes can be done within in window "ATC-Problems" in Hana Studio.

How exactly can I put all check results of a global ATC-Run from  Window "ATC-Result-Browser" into "ATC-Problems"?

At the moment I can just do the check on single objects.

entry.title: Re: Images in LMS Emails
entry.content:
Hi @ChrisStiles :

 

We are trying to update with  base64 but it doesnt work in some of the mail providers such as Gmail, how can we overcome such situations? Is there any settings we can ask the users to change in their email or any other possible workaround?

Many thanks in advance!!

entry.title: What is the name of the CDS view to check commitment values in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team

We are currently working with Enterprise Projects in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and exploring CDS Views related to them.

Right now, we’re trying to find out which CDS views show commitment values (like those from PRs and POs) linked to WBS elements.

entry.title: Stock search. Are variants possible
entry.content:
Hi,

I routinely search individual component stock levels using MMBE.

Is it possible to search stock levels for multiple components and create a variant that I could export to excel?

I have tried MM60 but this didn't tell be the stock levels only if a component was present or not.

Any help much appreciated.

entry.title: While Importing Database Getting this Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an error while importing a database into SAP Business One. The process fails midway and throws an error message (please refer to the below error message pasted below).

java.sql.SQLWarning: general warning: Type mismatch for table variable "RESULT": Target type "NVARCHAR(15)" of attribute "Financial Year" not same as assigned type "NVARCHAR(30)": line 71 col 3 (at pos 2565)

 

Thanks in advance!

Best Regards

Abdul Rahim

entry.title: Re: Multiple Country Activation in CBC

entry.title: Re: Plateau Report Designer LMS - Error dataset at initia...
entry.content:
Hello,

The connection when setting the datasource was successful, but I just added again on PlateauDataSource when the report is added and the error doesn't appear anymore.

But the issues when I add something to the dataset still appear. Do you have any KBA recommendation for custom column and how to add it to the report?

I add:

pa stud user ps

Then:

WHERE cpntdetail. sc stud id not _ used = s. stud id

AND ps.stud_id = s.stud_id

Then I add "ps.stud_id, DECODE(ps.COL_NUM, '30', null , ps.USER_VALUE) AS xxxx,"

But gives error: org.eclipse.birt.data.engine.core.DataException: Failed to prepare the query execution for the data set: LearningNeedsDataSet
Failed to prepare the following query for the data set type (org.eclipse.birt.report.data.oda.jdbc.JdbcSelectDataSet). 

Best Regards,

Daniela P

entry.title: Re: Unable to read GridView-List
entry.content:
Hi 

Is it possible to select the language at the time of logging in to SAP, or check for missing authorisation?

Regards

SS

entry.title: New revision roll-out only for new users (including re-training)
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to create a new revision (no. 2) of a training that is part of a Curriculum and has an annual retraining schedule.

However, the training owner wants the new revision to be assigned only to new users who have never completed this training before. Users who are already on a retraining cycle should complete the new revision in line with their retraining date. The training owner expects that users who have recently completed revision 1 should not be asked to complete revision 2 immediately, but rather as part of their upcoming retraining.

Do you know if this is possible in SAP LMS

SAP SuccessFactors Learning SAP Learning Solution 

kind regards,
Bartosz Zapalski

It might be relevant for you as well – could be worth checking out.

I've hosted the html page via BTP (BAS) but seems that these are not iFrame compatible (mostly) due to which CNS is not displaying the mashup. Currently when the mashup is opened, the Message - "refused to connect is displayed". The Content Security Policy has been updated to allow the domain. Is there anyway to address this or Am I missing something?

Regards,

Harsha

entry.title: Re: Unable to read GridView-List
entry.content: Language ist EN at the time of logging and no authorisation is missing. The shown problem doesn't show everytime. Most of the times the list is working normally but sometimes (without any changes to the other times they tried) the problem occures.

entry.title: SAC Agent Hosting for Azure MSSQL Connection
entry.content:
Hi team,

I’m reaching out following a request from a partner regarding SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) integration.

We need to connect SAC to an Azure-hosted MSSQL database, which—as I understand from the team—requires running a SAC agent. My partner's previous experience with RISE allowed them to host the SAC agent directly on the RISE infrastructure, assuming it was included in the BOM.

Now, they’re looking at the GROW setup.

Is the same approach possible with GROW? Can the SAC agent be hosted on GROW infrastructure, or would it need to be self-hosted in this scenario?

If anyone has experience or advice on this topic, especially regarding GROW vs. RISE for SAC agent hosting, I’d really appreciate your insights.

entry.title: Re: About guixt inputasistant
entry.content:
Pushbutton can be made without the need of inputAssistant, but may i know what exactly the pushbutton will do after you push. If I know what you need from the push button, may be I can provide the proper guixt scripting for you.

Kindly feel free to visit my youtube channel as below:

http://www.youtube.com/@Simplified-erp

Thanks,

entry.title: Quality info record control source inspection without goods receipt 'SPERRUNG_GR'
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

I don't see the field in SAP S4 system SPERRUNG_GR in Quality info record. 

Block GR if source inspection not done.  Can you guys let me know how to enable this field in quality info record. 

 

Thanks 

Varatha

entry.title: Duplicate vendor/BP check in S4 and Fiori
entry.content:
Hi all

My customer wants a duplicate vendor check in S4 and Fiori.  I have enabled duplicate VAT check and address check in OBA5 (the address check isn't working getting an ABAPer to have a look) But they want more 'complex' checks including BP name in older versions of S4 there was the BADi ADDRESS_SEARCH but this BADi is seemingly not available anymore - does anyone know what enhancement for BADi has replaced this if any?  I can find plenty of info on ADDRESS_SEARCH but no information on what to use now or information on a duplicate check on vendor name.

entry.title: how to send the data as excel attachment via email in sap bw on hana
entry.content:
Hello All,

I've requirement where user need a data as an excel format and send via email to vendor (broadcast). In attachment data should be vendor specific if file contain that vendor data should be go to that vendor only with subject line of vendor and date of data.

Thanks in advance for any help or tips.
